title: GraphSmith ACTIVE pointer
description: Closed schema for .graphsmith/evolvable/ACTIVE (contracts/01-promotion-transaction.md, Topology: 'ACTIVE  # pointer file: { schema_version, txid, tree, tree_manifest_sha256 }'). Written only by scripts/promote.js under lock (contract 04 B15); read by scripts/loaders.js's resolveActive(), exactly once per run start (contract 04 B2/B3 race control: 'tree immutable; pointer read once at start'). Consumers MUST treat any structural or pattern violation as fail-closed corruption, not a value to coerce or default.

schema_version.description: Pointer file format version, independent of the tree's own content.

txid.description: The promotion transaction that produced this pointer. Contract 01: 'txid = sha256(candidate_fingerprint + expected_active_sha)[:16]' -- 16 lowercase hex characters.

tree.description: Directory name of the active immutable tree under .graphsmith/evolvable/, contract 01 topology: 'v-<treehash>/'. Hex-only after the 'v-' prefix so this value can never be used to traverse outside the evolvable root when joined into a filesystem path. [inferring: exact treehash length not pinned by contract 01, so a permissive 8-64 hex-char range is accepted.]

tree_manifest_sha256.description: sha256 of the active tree's tree.manifest.json, hex-encoded. Contract 01: 'the manifest file is bound instead via tree_manifest_sha256 in ACTIVE + journal' (the manifest cannot hash itself). scripts/loaders.js#resolveActive verifies this binding on every read; a mismatch is fail-closed corruption, never silently accepted.
